keys.description: Cached FenceableGeometry value object. Read on every evaluate() call. Invalidated when the fenceable model's geometry columns change (via FenceableGeometryUpdated event).
Sorted set of the last 1000 evaluation IDs per workspace. Read by the RecentGeofenceActivityCheck health probe.
1h rolling counter: overrides_applied / evaluations_total. Populated by the metrics recorder. Read by GeofenceOverrideRateCheck.
Compiled fenceable morph map from #[Geofenceable] attribute discovery. { alias => class }.
Compiled subject morph map from #[GeofenceSubjectAlias] attribute discovery.
